spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.general_idea: Added SLF4J logger and debug statements to track the lifecycle of the web application initialization.
spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.human_impl: import org.slf4j.Logger; ... private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AppInitializer.class); ... LOGGER.debug("+onStartup({})", servletContext);

spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.general_idea: Changed the component scan base package from a hardcoded external package to the current class's package.
Renamed the ServletContext parameter from 'sc' to 'servletContext' for better readability.
Added Javadoc comments to the class and the onStartup method.
Added Javadoc block to the main application class to document author, version, and creation date.
Added Javadoc comment to the main method to document the args parameter.
spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added /** @param args */ block above main method

spring-security-web-login/src/test/java/.general_idea: Updated the test context configuration path to match the new kebab-case naming convention of the security configuration file.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the java.version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Added standard XML declaration to the pom.xml file.
Changed indentation from tabs to spaces for consistent formatting.
component-based-security/pom.xml.human_impl: Replaced tab characters with 4 spaces throughout the file.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched project version to use a flattened property placeholder.
Replaced the legacy mysql-connector-java artifact with the new mysql-connector-j artifact and specified version 8.2.0.

enable-method-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace hardcoded version string with a Maven property to support flattened POM builds.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication1/.general_idea: Updated the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Switched version management to use a ${revision} property, likely for flattened-pom support.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace the deprecated mysql-connector-java artifact with the new mysql-connector-j artifact required for newer MySQL drivers.
Explicitly set the MySQL connector version to 8.2.0 to ensure compatibility with the new artifact and JDK.

Added blank lines between dependency blocks for visual separation.
Corrected indentation of the maven-compiler-plugin comment and element.
